hero_title_accent: Designed for VASPs and Compliance Teams
hero_subtitle: SFTY Business centralizes case management and audit evidence to help compliance teams efficiently route, review, and document high-risk AML activities with full regulatory traceability.

problem_title: High-risk reviews depend on manual routing
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistent handling when high-risk cases lack coordinated workflows for escalation to MLROs or senior reviewers. Manual routing and fragmented provider outputs make audit trails incomplete and slow response times.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, alerts and case details into a unified workflow that routes high-risk reviews to MLROs with full audit trails and coordinated escalation paths for faster, consistent decisions.
workflow_title: From alerts to high-risk case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes AML alerts through risk scoring, manual review, case creation and decision logging to preserve evidence and prepare regulatory reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One audit-ready layer

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how cases route to MLRO for high-risk reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for high-risk compliance reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures outputs from multiple providers into connected workflows for high-risk case review, helping VASPs route, document and escalate suspicious activity more efficiently and transparently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY creates structured cases from alerts and provider data, routes them for MLRO review or escalation, records decisions and preserves all related evidence within one controlled compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and regulatory inspections, supporting all compliance actions are traceable and reviewable.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools to connect their outputs into a centralized compliance control layer without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and organizes provider outputs into workflows and evidence, but does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers in your compliance stack.
final_title: Route high-risk cases into structured reviews
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, regulatory updates and case evidence within controlled compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
